title: Japan Station Master & Ridership — Canonical Open Datasets (Greater Tokyo)
description:
Two combinable, maintained open datasets built from the Public Transportation Open Data Center (ODPT), sharing a common station_id join key:

  • Station Master — entity-resolved: one row per physical station (e.g. Shinjuku resolved to a single entity across JR East, Keio, Odakyu, Seibu, Tokyo Metro and Toei), with the per-operator source records preserved and a merge-confidence flag. 425 physical stations from 720 operator-line records; 94 lines.
  • Station Ridership 2000-2025 — annual per-station passenger journeys (3,144 tidy rows, 292 stations), joined to the station master. Captures the COVID trough and recovery station by station.

Coverage is Greater Tokyo (ODPT's currently-published operators); nationwide coverage is planned as v2. Existing English-language datasets on this topic are largely hand-built, stale, or incomplete — these are annually-refreshed, schema-frozen alternatives with transparent methodology. Full harvest/build/validate pipeline is included in the repository. Data derives from ODPT under the Public Transportation Open Data Basic License (CC BY 4.0 equivalent); required attribution is in LICENSE-DATA.txt.
